message:
fix(ci): disable CGO for Windows build in goreleaser

The Dolt embedded driver requires CGO with ICU/zstd C libraries that
are not available for mingw cross-compilation. Since all Dolt storage
code is now behind //go:build cgo tags, CGO_ENABLED=0 builds work
correctly without Dolt support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew

files.patch:
@@ -93,9 +93,7 @@ builds:
     main: ./cmd/bd
     binary: bd
     env:
-      - CGO_ENABLED=1
-      - CC=x86_64-w64-mingw32-gcc
-      - CXX=x86_64-w64-mingw32-g++
+      - CGO_ENABLED=0
     goos:
       - windows
     goarch:
